fdtd_reference_grid.important_note: gprMax output uses the CFL time step and a 701 ns solver request, then postprocessing validates HDF5 coverage and resamples to the canonical 0–700 ns, 501-sample grid.

label_policy.flat_reference_arrival_time_ns: exact horizontal layered symmetric bistatic travel-time reference through air, cover and weathered layer
label_policy.curved_reference_arrival_time_ns: column-wise layered search reference only; not claimed to be an exact specular-ray arrival
label_policy.visible_phase_time_ns: must be extracted after simulation from full_scene minus matched no_basal_contrast_control
label_policy.negative_semantics: target_presence=false and zero target mask after output validation; weak/ignore measured labels are never converted into negatives

solver_runtime.version_policy: Record exact installed version. A different version requires geometry-only and control-stage revalidation before any formal use.
solver_runtime.moving_scan_policy: Use -n 256 with --geometry-fixed only for static geometry and simple Hertzian source/receiver steps.
